title: Audit Operator
description: Run proof-first workflows, capture evidence, and maintain local audit posture.

questions.prompt: What command is used for a live trust/value proof run?
Which mode blocks most write actions by default?
Which export is used for support diagnostics?

title: Deployment Admin
description: Enforce approved providers, update lanes, and relay restrictions.

questions.prompt: What should be restricted for offline-first enterprise policy?
What gate protects production packaging quality?
What should every applied policy include?

title: Compliance Lead
description: Verify artifact integrity, support audit requests, and preserve traceability.

questions.prompt: What verifies packaged artifacts have not been tampered?
What is required for external compliance review handoff?
Where should policy and proof changes be recorded?

title: Marketplace Builder
description: Package, price, and validate marketplace-facing modules with policy-safe defaults.

questions.prompt: What must not be bypassed by marketplace modules?
What should partner-facing modules include for trust?
Which signal is important before shipping new paid module updates?
